content:
Find ALL free models available on NVIDIA NIM API (which uses nvapi- keys). I need:
1. Complete list of free/NIM models
2. The exact model IDs for API calls
3. Rate limits for free tier
4. Which models are best for: coding, vision/multimodal, reasoning

Search NVIDIA NIM docs, API references. Return structured list with model ID, capabilities, and free tier limits.
<!-- OMO_INTERNAL_INITIATOR -->
